ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "repository_url" TEXT /* URL of the repository for the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "project_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project lead */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the configuration setting */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this configuration is associated with */,
  "view_path" TEXT /* Path that CCNet checks for modifications */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Name of the branch monitored */,
  "auto_get_source" INTEGER /* Whether to auto-retrieve the source */,
  "use_label" INTEGER /* Whether to apply a label on successful builds */,
  "use_baseline" INTEGER /* Whether to apply a baseline on successful builds */,
  "build_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of builds (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "build_timeout" INTEGER /* Timeout for builds in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "builds" (
  "build_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with this build */,
  "build_status" TEXT /* Status of the build (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "build_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the build was executed */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the build in milliseconds */,
  "trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger that initiated the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("build_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_builds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build associated with this report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the build report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_reports_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the error was logged */,
  "error_level" TEXT /* Level of the error (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_triggers" (
  "trigger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each build trigger */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the trigger */,
  "trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of the trigger (e.g., push, pull request) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event that activates the trigger */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the trigger was last activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trigger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_triggers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry in the build history */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relevant build */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the history entry was logged */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the build at this history point */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the build */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_history_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that has a dependency */,
  "dependent_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project that is depended on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_dependent_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_dependencies_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "build_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "build_id" INTEGER /* ID of the build associated with this statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., build_time, success_rate) */,
  "stat_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_build_stats_build_id FOREIGN KEY ("build_id") REFERENCES builds ("build_id")
)
